title: eriocaulon decemflorum f. coreanum
intro: Eriocaulon decemflorum f. coreanum is a variant of the Eriocaulon decemflorum plant, belonging to the Eriocaulaceae family, commonly known as pipewort or umbrella plant. Native to Korea, this aquatic perennial has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Eriocaulon decemflorum f. coreanum is often used in teas, infusions, or decoctions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
